content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally post-election with Nifty +0.82%, Bank Nifty +0.84%, Auto +1.38%, Realty +1.90%, Pharma +1.10%. VIX easing -1.79% to 18.13 signals reducing fear. Existing book is benefiting broadly with +1.14% portfolio P&L today. Focus is on trailing SLs to lock in gains on winners rather than chasing new breakouts at extended levels.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1038.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%), MOFSL Buy, +7% unrealized. Trailing SL slightly from 1035.27 to 1038 (still ~1.4% below CMP 1052.60, comfortable buffer). Stored SL is already above entry. Holding to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge holding. -1.7% within tolerable range, SL 119 still valid. JPMorgan $5,000+/oz long-term thesis intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.5% unrealized at near-52w high (1851 vs CMP 1835). Q4 results May 19 — binary event ~10 sessions away, not yet inside 3-day window. Tightening SL from 1801.24 to 1810 (~1.4% below CMP, monotonic-up trail). Will reassess approaching May 19 for binary event discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 477.50,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.8% at 52-week high (485.70). Trailing SL from 475 to 477.50 (~1.4% below CMP 484.50). April production -9.7% YoY is concern but e-auction premium 51% supports near-term. SL above entry locks in profit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 203.50,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.2% at fresh 52-week high (207.65) on 8.2x volume — institutional conviction. Original target 212 nearly hit at 206.90 CMP. Raising target to 220 to let the breakout run; tightening SL from 207.78 to... wait — current SL 207.78 is ABOVE CMP 206.90, that's a self-stopout. Per state-verification rule: stored SL 207.78 > CMP 206.90 means position is effectively already triggered. Lowering SL is not permitted (can only tighten = raise for longs). Cannot loosen. Therefore best action: HOLD with note that engine may stop us out on next downtick. Reverting to BOOK_PARTIAL via position_actions instead. Actually issuing EXIT to capture the gain cleanly rather than risk slippage."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 250,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 207.78 is ABOVE CMP 206.90 (verified arithmetic: 207.78 > 206.90). Position is effectively at SL trigger zone — any downtick stops us out. Cannot loosen SL. Cleanest action: book the +3.4% gain at market rather than let micro-reversal stop us out at 207.78 with slippage risk. Original target 212 nearly achieved. FY26 full-year PAT -55% YoY is a real concern; Q4 was a low-base rebound. Take the win."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.9%, SL 296 just slightly above CMP 294.80 — at risk. Verified: 296 > 294.80 means SL is above CMP for a long, position essentially at SL. However it's a pre-existing SL set above entry-trigger logic; engine may stop us out. Bullish thesis intact (Brent $85-90, ONGC discounting only $65), Q4 May 21. Letting the SL do its work — if it triggers, take the small loss; if it bounces, room to run. No MODIFY (cannot loosen)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9% on pharma rally. Trailing SL from 23.55 to 23.85 (~1.0% below CMP 24.09). Cipla May 13 + SunPharma May 19 earnings cluster supports basket. Locks in modest gain above entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "new_target": 985.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1% on financial-services rally, +2.64% intraday. Tightening SL from 928 to 940 (~1.5% below CMP 954.55, still below entry 944 by 0.4% — wait, 940 < 944 entry, so this is below breakeven). Adjusting: SL 940 still tightens from 928 (raised by 12). Acceptable trail. Target 985 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1675.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, breaking above prior 52w high (1672) intraday to 1723. Q4 strong (revenue +27%, PAT +9.4%), FY27 guidance reaffirmed. Tightening SL from 1655 to 1675 (~1.9% below CMP 1705). Target 1790 in line with sell-side consensus 1830."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0%, hit 1600 intraday then faded to 1538 (-3.9% intraday reversal). Q4 results May 14 = 8 sessions out, not yet in 3-day binary window. Crude tanker thesis intact. SL 1490 (~3.1% below CMP) gives room. No tightening yet — wait for stabilization. Will reassess closer to May 14."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1038.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in profit above entry; thesis intact post Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; SL unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail toward 52-week high; reassess pre May 19 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 477.50,
      "reasoning": "Lock breakeven+ at 52-week high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL above CMP; book +3.4% gain cleanly via market."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL near CMP; cannot loosen. Let SL work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "Lock in profit on pharma rally."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL on financial-services rally."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1675.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail under fresh 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday reversal from 1600; let SL 1490 give room ahead of May 14 results."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL (Q4 today), AMBUJACEM (Q4 today), HEROMOTOCO (Q4 tomorrow May 5), MANAPPURAM, EXIDEIND — all binary today/tomorrow, avoiding fresh entries pre-print per binary-event discipline. FLUOROCHEM +12% on weak 0.9x volume looks like short-covering pop, not accumulation; Q4 May 13 binary risk also caps interest. BAJAJ-AUTO gap-up +8.58% — no chase, wait for consolidation. KOTAKBANK post-result dip is interesting but want to see base form. MARUTI/SYNGENE on chase risk. INFY weakness is structural per ValueQuest — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned — 51% deployed, 10 holdings broadly green with +1.14% intraday P&L. Priority today is risk management on existing positions: trailing SLs on 6 winners, exiting BANDHANBNK cleanly (SL above CMP scenario), and respecting binary-event windows (SUNPHARMA May 19, GESHIP May 14, ONGC May 21). No new entries — extended market post-election + multiple binaries clustering in 2-3 weeks argues for capital preservation over fresh exposure. Cumulative P&L still -2,566 despite today's gains; defending winners is the right call."
}
